content:
A figure in the mist

Thick fog swiftly engulfed the surroundings. The damp, icy mist seeped into the collar, sending chills down the spine. In the distance, a familiar figure flickered—then vanished without a trace. 

Options

【Search】
Lose 20% of your current HP to choose one of three SSR Fate Wheels.
【Wait for the Mist to Clear】
Randomly enhance one card.

Choices result

【Search】
You impulsively rushed into the mist. During your search, you tripped over a rock and fell. 
Just as you hit the ground, a mechanical hand pulled you up. 
Though you didn’t see the person’s face, his attire and the signature mechanical arm made it clear—it was Senior William.
Without saying a word, he vanished back into the fog.
Now, in your hand, you find a box that carries the scent of sea salt.

【Wait for the Mist to Clear】
You stood still, and before long, the mist began to clear.
When you tried to look for that figure again, they were nowhere to be found.
But during your search, you picked up an unopened letter.
Upon opening it, the message inside read:
“I will meet you further down your path.”
thread_title: Slay the Spire Morimens Mod Text Provided Post

content:
Fear of the Dark

You step into a room shrouded in complete darkness.In the distance, a faint glow catches your eye.
As you approach, you find a nearly extinguished candle—and beside it, a person.
Looking closer, you realize it’s Wenkel.The moment she sees you, her eyes light up with joy.
She grabs your hand tightly and pleads,
“Y-you… you’re XXX (character name)… P-please! Do you have anything that can give off light? I’ll do anything—just please, give it to me!”
As she speaks, Wenkel clings to your leg desperately—

Options

【Give a Light Source 】
Gain the Construct “Warp Energy Storage Flask”
（Allows you to cast Exalt twice in one turn. ）

【Take Winkle away】
Gain a card: “Wenkel’s Aid”
(Destroy: Gain 50 Aliemus. At the start of your next 3 turns, gain 50 Aliemus.)

【Hidden Option】(Appears when the character is Corposant）
【Let Winkle Conduct Research】
Lose 15 HP. Gain the Construct “Warp Energy Storage Flask”
（Allows you to cast Exalt twice in one turn. ）



Selection result

【Give a Light Source 】
You hand the glowing object in your backpack to Winkle. She heaved a sigh of relief as the lights around her became brighter and wider. Winkle glanced at the table that had been broken into pieces, and took out a can that emitted a red electric current and handed it to you.

【Take Winkle away】
You forcefully pull Winkle out of the room. After a commotion, she calms down. You take her to a room that has never been shrouded in darkness, and she pulls out something like a battery from her pocket and hands it to you.

【Hidden Option】(Appears when the character is Corposant）
【Let Winkle Conduct Research】
The light emanating from you dispels Winkle's fear. When she asks you if you are willing to let her study your body, you readily agree. After waking up, you feel sore all over. She takes out a jar emitting red electricity from behind and hands it to you.
thread_title: Slay the Spire Morimens Mod Text Provided Post

content:
Weak He/She

You are walking on a wet road and suddenly see a familiar figure in the distance. You walk closer and see that it is XXX (not the current character). He/she lies weakly on the ground, clothes soaked by rain, mouth opening and closing. You decide——

Options
 

【Take him/her with you】 
Get XXX (occupies one potion slot. When you are fatally wounded and death resistance is not triggered, discard him/her, become immune to death and recover 1 health point)

【Wake him/her up and give him/her money】
Reduce 30 gold coins and get XXX's support card (destroy)


Choices result

【Take him/her with you】
You carry him/her on your back, he/she... (description of the character's appearance, weight, etc.), his/her head rests on your shoulder, the hot air from his/her mouth blows directly on your face, at this moment he/she is as fragile as a little bird.

【Wake him/her up and give him/her money】
You shake him/her body, he/she wakes up, you give him/her some money and let him/her walk behind you, he/she gives you an item in gratitude.
